chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3184 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 12.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arshad Khan Tanoli, advocate for the respondents No.2 and 3 Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up on 20.09.2023, which is over two years ago. Despite the lapse of two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation despite the lapse of two years. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
